notes: EncoderDecoderCache for BertLMHeadModel decoder mode is composed from 2x DynamicCache (verified at modeling_bert.py:650). BERT has no L4 in kb-nano; closest is L3 bert_encoder.py.

Sliding-window attention is mask construction (HF masking_utils.create_sliding_window_causal_mask); kb-nano attention kernels accept the mask tensor unchanged. Modular DSL file modular_mistral.py exists; modeling_mistral.py is the runtime artifact.
L4 pipeline at tasks/baseline/L4/whisper.py. EncoderDecoderCache wrapping handled inside L4.
No L4 vit pipeline but DINOv3/SigLIP2 are vision transformers using the same primitive set; ViT is wiring with existing L1/L2/L3 (vit_encoder_block.py).

partial_or_unsupported_ops: adaptive_avg_pool_1d(no L1 kernel; classifier head uses torch.nn fallback consistent with kb-nano convention)
notes: SwinV2 has L4 (swinv2.py); v1 reuses same building blocks. Adaptive avg pool 1d is head-only; same convention as kb-nano mobilenetv4/yolov10.
L4 pipeline at tasks/baseline/L4/mamba.py. selective_scan and causal_conv1d come from vLLM imports in tasks/baseline/L2/mamba_mixer.py:35-44.
RT-DETR (v1) reuses kb-nano v2 deformable attention with method=default which is bit-equivalent.
Standard ResNet backbone; all ops in L1.
CTC loss is training-only; log_softmax is torch builtin.
Roberta-like encoder; same primitive set as BERT.

partial_or_unsupported_ops: conv_transpose_2d(no L1 kernel; used in ForSemanticSegmentation seg head via torch.nn fallback);adaptive_avg_pool_2d(no L1 kernel; used in seg head ASPP via torch.nn fallback)
notes: ForSemanticSegmentation: partial (uses ConvTranspose2d at line 1109/1112/1115 and AdaptiveAvgPool2d at line 889 in ASPP); ForImageClassification + Model: composable. BEiT-style encoder.

kb-nano MultiScaleDeformableAttentionV2 method=default is bit-identical to v1 deformable attention (verified by reading both kernels side-by-side: 2*loc-1 transform; F.grid_sample with bilinear/zeros/align_corners=False).
Folder contains only tokenization_barthez.py and tokenization_barthez_fast.py; no PyTorch architecture (re-uses BART/mBART). NO_PT_MODELING.
